nasb.text: “When they sin against You (for there is no man who does not sin) and You are angry with them and deliver them to an enemy, so that they take them away captive to a land far off or near,

esv.text: “If they sin against you—for there is no one who does not sin—and you are angry with them and give them to an enemy, so that they are carried away captive to a land far or near,

cnv.text: “如果你的子民得罪了你，你向他們發怒，把他們交在仇敵面前，以致仇敵把他們擄到外地或遠或近；

ccb.text: “世上没有不犯罪的人，如果你的子民得罪你，以致你向他们发怒，让敌人把他们掳走，不论远近，
